# kDNSServiceMaxServiceName | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ dnssd ](/documentation/dnssd)

- [ kDNSServiceMaxServiceName ](/documentation/dnssd/kDNSServiceMaxServiceName)

-  kDNSServiceMaxServiceName 

Global Variable# kDNSServiceMaxServiceName

iOS 10.0+iPadOS 10.0+Mac Catalyst 13.0+macOS 10.12+tvOS 10.0+visionOS 1.0+watchOS 3.0+

```
var kDNSServiceMaxServiceName: Int32 { get }
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/dnssd/kDNSServiceMaxServiceName#Discussion)

Maximum length, in bytes, of a service name represented as a literal C string, including the terminating NULL at the end.
